TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Misirumut sapinang o suwal no Pangcah Kina Pangcah hananayi, o naytiniyaay a tamdaw o taywan,siwa' kina ngangasawan no Pangcah hananayi, satataakay a nika saniyaro' asa Pangcah. O tamdaw no heni iri, makasabaw tu spat a emang,o aro' no heni iri, itinia:min i saamisan tuwa tangasa itini satimulan. InaPancah hananayi, pihaceng ko nika debungan no napayrang a misumuwad ko nisimsim, maratar ko heni a mabana' to niyan sapaan'ip hananay atu niyan sakamawmah a misatukus hananay a demak. Ira kuyu nika tala lutuk nuheny a miadup to aadupen, yu tala lutuki,midateng, anu tala liyal a mirengus ,itini alo' mibuting, mahaen ko saka orip no heni. Unu kakawawsan a demak no heni i,tusa kya micid:kay a kakawaw, cacay satui, onu ina ko tatudungan no heni iri, sipangangan ko heni iri, alaen ko tangal no ina amisanga' to ngangan, makumud amin no inaan a lalabu' no luma' a maorip. O kakawaw no heni to demak hananay, ono ina ko ririden no heni, ni riridan no ina ko heni a mitudung to sademaken to tu:ud, irasisa babahi hananay itini i lalabu no luma' hananayi, oyaan o mala tatapangan, nanay o kakawaw nina lalabu no luma'. Skatusa satu iri, ira kuyu mihecaan nika sariked no heni to dademaken sipakayni mihecaan koyu tatudungan. O babainay iri, u tangasaantu ko sepet nika orip masakapah, sipakayni i sakakaay koyo pasebana' to kakawaw hananay a riked no heni. Anu itinitu i nobinawlan a kakawaw o demak aca, ruma to dademaken hananay sipakyni aca i sakakaay, o sakakaay hananay o satuasay kuyu tatengilen, kabanaan ko yaan a suwal no mama sakakaay paturtuy to saba', haenen ko nika dademak no heni to sapilimu'ut to dademaken. Sipakayni no Pangcah lalabu' no luma' hananayi, kumudkumud sananay a mapulung to dademaken ato iniyan satayal to niyan kakawawto noheni kakanglayay a demak, kumuden amin no heni. Ini lisin no lumaluma'an iri, maualah ko heni baluma' to icep, o apalu, uniyan kamaya, o kyabes, o makaen no lalabu no luma'. Irasisa iniyanhanto o caayay kalecad a kakawaw nina Pangcah hananay, o kakasapinangan ko nika caykalecad ato niyan kalaw tamtamdaw. Ona Pangcah hananay, maulah itini to caayay ka sumuwad no yaayaanay a kitakit. Ona Pancaah hananay, mingata midudu to yaan no caayhen kaw nisumuwadan, mingata to paoripay to heniyan a nisangaan, o sananaysisa maolah kuheni to mahiniyay caayay kawni sumuwadan, oyuho yaayaanay henay a kitakit. O mihecaan iri, adihay kiniyan nipisakakawaw no heni to lisin amibaung to paoripay, sikakawaw kuheni tuyu paluma', irakuyu miketep tonika adihay noheni nipaketepan, iniyan a miadup a mibuting numasakapahay a lisin talatuas sananay. O mamelamelawawy a nikadademak no heni a kakawawi, iniyan kyaru o hadihay ko niketpan, namiketep sananay a lisin, tangasa anini mamelaw no mitai, limuutun:henay no heni atangsa itini i wawa kusubana to matiniyay to mihemiehcaan mamelawto no mita kunika silisin noheni to mahiniyay o nipiketep hananay a niyaniyaro'. Yu makina misalisintu kuheni irir, tulutulu a rumiadi, tangatangsa i sakapitu a rumiad a maherek. Yu malingatu satuiri, tala lutuk ko ruma, tuwa tala liyal ko ruma a nika nanuwang no kapah no niyaro' a silisin,sikakawaw to tataa:kay a nika lecapo'. Ina Pangcah hananayi, yu malecapo'toway misatataak a mimelaw to matuasay atoyu kilemelay a misimsim, ato mabanaay a mikeru'. ira kya ta:ducusducus to iniyan o kero' hananay, kyanca o kalaw rimurimuratu nasaan kita a mimelaw tinademak iri, arawsaan itira ira kuyu tulun o subana' hananay i tini mahiniyay a makalecao' no heni, ira ko pasubana' adi:hay kiniyan o saka sidepoc sananay a nika lecapo' no heni. Irasisa to mihecaani, oyaankyaro o lalimo:ten no heni a lisin ko matiniyay. Misatatapangan nanay ko heni to niya no sakaorip no heni hananay, sakaitni nokakawasan a tenten hananay. O matiniyay satu no heni a kakawaw itini no Pangcah hananay, oyuno sakacaay karupisak kasumuwad ko cenfel no demak sananay. Mala Pangcah hanany a tamdawi manga:ay to labang, masakaola:han a cabayen, caypisa tatatata:ak ko inikaorip caytu pisaoyaoyaan, cayka sikakawaw toyo misasumusumuwad tuniya nika nanuwang ko Pangcah anu mamaan ko tiyad nisimsimman mahaaensa. Iniyan hananay iri, kabanaen ko nika awaay ko niumuwadan itiyaday ni heni a kakawaw, awaay ko nidumuwadan hanay mahaenay kyro o yaya:antu a caayay ka sumuwad caycaw ninananuwangan a kitakid. Anusuwalen kina kakawaw no Pangcah hananayi, mahana:min kawsa ko maoripay anini amisimsim tina Pangcah hananay saykasitatudung toyu nipakalas to demak, cakasitatudung tuyu misauyauyaan misumuwad to kakawaw, irasisa kakawlahan na:min no maoripay inyan a misimsim no heni, irasisa sakakapah nina tamdaw nusa kitai, sulinay ira kuyu sipakayni pakatatapangan no cudata kakawaw asaan iri, anu sipakayni no tamdawn anusaan iri, o mamela:wan kina kulit nina Pangcah hananay.
S.PHON: misiro~u~umo~u~ut sapinaŋ o~u so~u~uwaɾ no~u paŋʦaħ kina paŋʦaħ ħananaji, o~u najtinijaaj a tamɬ~ɮaw o~u tajwan,siwaʡ kina ŋaŋasawan no~u paŋʦaħ ħananaji, satataakaj a nika sanijaro~uʡ asa paŋʦaħ. o~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u ħəni iri, makasab~b~vaw to~u~u spat a əmaŋ,o~u aro~uʡ no~u ħəni iri, itinia:min i saamisan to~u~uwa taŋasa itini satimo~u~uɾan. inapanʦaħ ħananaji, piħaʦəŋ ko~u nika ɬ~ɮəb~b~vo~u~uŋan no~u napajraŋ a miso~u~umo~u~uwaɬ~ɮ ko~u nisimsim, maratar ko~u ħəni a mab~b~vanaʡ to~u nijan sapaanʡip ħananaj ato~u~u nijan sakamawmaħ a misato~u~uko~u~us ħananaj a ɬ~ɮəmak. ira ko~u~ujo~u~u nika taɾa ɾo~u~uto~u~uk no~u~uħənj a miaɬ~ɮo~u~up to~u aaɬ~ɮo~u~upən, jo~u~u taɾa ɾo~u~uto~u~uki,miɬ~ɮatəŋ, ano~u~u taɾa ɾijaɾ a mirəŋo~u~us ,itini aɾo~uʡ mib~b~vo~u~utiŋ, maħaən ko~u saka o~urip no~u ħəni. o~u~uno~u~u kakawawsan a ɬ~ɮəmak no~u ħəni i,to~u~usa kja miʦiɬ~ɮ:kaj a kakawaw, ʦaʦaj sato~u~ui, o~uno~u~u ina ko~u tato~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋan no~u ħəni iri, sipaŋaŋan ko~u ħəni iri, aɾaən ko~u taŋaɾ no~u ina amisaŋaʡ to~u ŋaŋan, mako~u~umo~u~uɬ~ɮ amin no~u inaan a ɾaɾab~b~vo~u~uʡ no~u ɾo~u~umaʡ a mao~urip. o~u kakawaw no~u ħəni to~u ɬ~ɮəmak ħananaj, o~uno~u ina ko~u ririɬ~ɮən no~u ħəni, ni ririɬ~ɮan no~u ina ko~u ħəni a mito~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ to~u saɬ~ɮəmakən to~u to~u~u:o~u~uɬ~ɮ, irasisa b~b~vab~b~vaħi ħananaj itini i ɾaɾab~b~vo~u~u no~u ɾo~u~umaʡ ħananaji, o~ujaan o~u maɾa tatapaŋan, nanaj o~u kakawaw nina ɾaɾab~b~vo~u~u no~u ɾo~u~umaʡ. skato~u~usa sato~u~u iri, ira ko~u~ujo~u~u miħəʦaan nika sarikəɬ~ɮ no~u ħəni to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakən sipakajni miħəʦaan ko~ujo~u~u tato~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋan. o~u b~b~vab~b~vainaj iri, o~u~u taŋasaanto~u~u ko~u səpət nika o~urip masakapaħ, sipakajni i sakakaaj ko~ujo~u pasəb~b~vanaʡ to~u kakawaw ħananaj a rikəɬ~ɮ no~u ħəni. ano~u~u itinito~u~u i no~ub~b~vinawɾan a kakawaw o~u ɬ~ɮəmak aʦa, ro~u~uma to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakən ħananaj sipakjni aʦa i sakakaaj, o~u sakakaaj ħananaj o~u sato~u~uasaj ko~u~ujo~u~u tatəŋiɾən, kab~b~vanaan ko~u jaan a so~u~uwaɾ no~u mama sakakaaj pato~u~urto~u~uj to~u sab~b~vaʡ, ħaənən ko~u nika ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak no~u ħəni to~u sapiɾimo~u~uʡo~u~ut to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakən. sipakajni no~u paŋʦaħ ɾaɾab~b~vo~u~uʡ no~u ɾo~u~umaʡ ħananaji, ko~u~umo~u~uɬ~ɮko~u~umo~u~uɬ~ɮ sananaj a mapo~u~uɾo~u~uŋ to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakən ato~u inijan satajaɾ to~u nijan kakawawto~u no~uħəni kakaŋɾajaj a ɬ~ɮəmak, ko~u~umo~u~uɬ~ɮən amin no~u ħəni. ini ɾisin no~u ɾo~u~umaɾo~u~umaʡan iri, mao~u~uaɾaħ ko~u ħəni b~b~vaɾo~u~umaʡ to~u iʦəp, o~u apaɾo~u~u, o~u~unijan kamaja, o~u kjab~b~vəs, o~u makaən no~u ɾaɾab~b~vo~u~u no~u ɾo~u~umaʡ. irasisa inijanħanto~u o~u ʦaajaj kaɾəʦaɬ~ɮ a kakawaw nina paŋʦaħ ħananaj, o~u kakasapinaŋan ko~u nika ʦajkaɾəʦaɬ~ɮ ato~u nijan kaɾaw tamtamɬ~ɮaw. o~una paŋʦaħ ħananaj, mao~u~uɾaħ itini to~u ʦaajaj ka so~u~umo~u~uwaɬ~ɮ no~u jaajaanaj a kitakit. o~una panʦaaħ ħananaj, miŋata miɬ~ɮo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~u to~u jaan no~u ʦaajħən kaw niso~u~umo~u~uwaɬ~ɮan, miŋata to~u pao~uripaj to~u ħənijan a nisaŋaan, o~u sananajsisa mao~uɾaħ ko~u~uħəni to~u maħinijaj ʦaajaj kawni so~u~umo~u~uwaɬ~ɮan, o~ujo~u~uħo~u jaajaanaj ħənaj a kitakit. o~u miħəʦaan iri, aɬ~ɮiħaj kinijan nipisakakawaw no~u ħəni to~u ɾisin amib~b~vao~u~uŋ to~u pao~uripaj, sikakawaw ko~u~uħəni to~u~ujo~u~u paɾo~u~umaʡ, irako~u~ujo~u~u mikətəp to~unika aɬ~ɮiħaj no~uħəni nipakətəpan, inijan a miaɬ~ɮo~u~up a mib~b~vo~u~utiŋ no~u~umasakapaħaj a ɾisin taɾato~u~uas sananaj. o~u maməɾaməɾawawj a nikaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak no~u ħəni a kakawawi, inijan kjaro~u~u o~u ħaɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u nikətpan, namikətəp sananaj a ɾisin, taŋasa anini maməɾaw no~u mitai, ɾimo~u~uo~u~uto~u~un:ħənaj no~u ħəni ataŋsa itini i wawa ko~u~uso~u~ub~b~vana to~u matinijaj to~u miħəmiəħʦaan maməɾawto~u no~u mita ko~u~unika siɾisin no~uħəni to~u maħinijaj o~u nipikətəp ħananaj a nijanijaro~uʡ. jo~u~u makina misaɾisinto~u~u ko~u~uħəni irir, to~u~uɾo~u~uto~u~uɾo~u~u a ro~u~umiaɬ~ɮi, taŋataŋsa i sakapito~u~u a ro~u~umiaɬ~ɮ a maħərək. jo~u~u maɾiŋato~u~u sato~u~uiri, taɾa ɾo~u~uto~u~uk ko~u ro~u~uma, to~u~uwa taɾa ɾijaɾ ko~u ro~u~uma a nika nano~u~uwaŋ no~u kapaħ no~u nijaro~uʡ a siɾisin,sikakawaw to~u tataa:kaj a nika ɾəʦapo~uʡ. ina paŋʦaħ ħananaji, jo~u~u maɾəʦapo~uʡto~uwaj misatataak a miməɾaw to~u mato~u~uasaj ato~ujo~u~u kiɾəməɾaj a misimsim, ato~u mab~b~vanaaj a mikəro~u~uʡ. ira kja ta:ɬ~ɮo~u~uʦo~u~usɬ~ɮo~u~uʦo~u~us to~u inijan o~u kəro~uʡ ħananaj, kjanʦa o~u kaɾaw rimo~u~urimo~u~urato~u~u nasaan kita a miməɾaw tinaɬ~ɮəmak iri, arawsaan itira ira ko~u~ujo~u~u to~u~uɾo~u~un o~u so~u~ub~b~vanaʡ ħananaj i tini maħinijaj a makaɾəʦao~uʡ no~u ħəni, ira ko~u paso~u~ub~b~vanaʡ aɬ~ɮi:ħaj kinijan o~u saka siɬ~ɮəpo~uʦ sananaj a nika ɾəʦapo~uʡ no~u ħəni. irasisa to~u miħəʦaani, o~ujaankjaro~u o~u ɾaɾimo~u:tən no~u ħəni a ɾisin ko~u matinijaj. misatatapaŋan nanaj ko~u ħəni to~u nija no~u sakao~urip no~u ħəni ħananaj, sakaitni no~ukakawasan a təntən ħananaj. o~u matinijaj sato~u~u no~u ħəni a kakawaw itini no~u paŋʦaħ ħananaj, o~ujo~u~uno~u sakaʦaaj karo~u~upisak kaso~u~umo~u~uwaɬ~ɮ ko~u ʦənfəɾ no~u ɬ~ɮəmak sananaj. maɾa paŋʦaħ ħananj a tamɬ~ɮawi maŋa:aj to~u ɾab~b~vaŋ, masakao~uɾa:ħan a ʦab~b~vajən, ʦajpisa tatatata:ak ko~u inikao~urip ʦajto~u~u pisao~ujao~ujaan, ʦajka sikakawaw to~ujo~u misaso~u~umo~u~uso~u~umo~u~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u~unija nika nano~u~uwaŋ ko~u paŋʦaħ ano~u~u mamaan ko~u tijaɬ~ɮ nisimsimman maħaaənsa. inijan ħananaj iri, kab~b~vanaən ko~u nika awaaj ko~u nio~u~umo~u~uwaɬ~ɮan itijaɬ~ɮaj ni ħəni a kakawaw, awaaj ko~u niɬ~ɮo~u~umo~u~uwaɬ~ɮan ħanaj maħaənaj kjro~u o~u jaja:anto~u~u a ʦaajaj ka so~u~umo~u~uwaɬ~ɮ ʦajʦaw ninanano~u~uwaŋan a kitakiɬ~ɮ. ano~u~uso~u~uwaɾən kina kakawaw no~u paŋʦaħ ħananaji, maħana:min kawsa ko~u mao~uripaj anini amisimsim tina paŋʦaħ ħananaj sajkasitato~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ to~ujo~u~u nipakaɾas to~u ɬ~ɮəmak, ʦakasitato~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ to~u~ujo~u~u misao~u~ujao~u~ujaan miso~u~umo~u~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u kakawaw, irasisa kakawɾaħan na:min no~u mao~uripaj injan a misimsim no~u ħəni, irasisa sakakapaħ nina tamɬ~ɮaw no~u~usa kitai, so~u~uɾinaj ira ko~u~ujo~u~u sipakajni pakatatapaŋan no~u ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮata kakawaw asaan iri, ano~u~u sipakajni no~u tamɬ~ɮawn ano~u~usaan iri, o~u maməɾa:wan kina ko~u~uɾit nina paŋʦaħ ħananaj.
S.FORM: Misirumut sapinang o suwal no Pangcah Kina Pangcah hananayi, o naytiniyaay a tamdaw o taywan,siwa' kina ngangasawan no Pangcah hananayi, satataakay a nika saniyaro' asa Pangcah. O tamdaw no heni iri, makasabaw tu spat a emang,o aro' no heni iri, itinia:min i saamisan tuwa tangasa itini satimulan. InaPancah hananayi, pihaceng ko nika debungan no napayrang a misumuwad ko nisimsim, maratar ko heni a mabana' to niyan sapaan'ip hananay atu niyan sakamawmah a misatukus hananay a demak. Ira kuyu nika tala lutuk nuheny a miadup to aadupen, yu tala lutuki,midateng, anu tala liyal a mirengus ,itini alo' mibuting, mahaen ko saka orip no heni. Unu kakawawsan a demak no heni i,tusa kya micid:kay a kakawaw, cacay satui, onu ina ko tatudungan no heni iri, sipangangan ko heni iri, alaen ko tangal no ina amisanga' to ngangan, makumud amin no inaan a lalabu' no luma' a maorip. O kakawaw no heni to demak hananay, ono ina ko ririden no heni, ni riridan no ina ko heni a mitudung to sademaken to tu:ud, irasisa babahi hananay itini i lalabu no luma' hananayi, oyaan o mala tatapangan, nanay o kakawaw nina lalabu no luma'. Skatusa satu iri, ira kuyu mihecaan nika sariked no heni to dademaken sipakayni mihecaan koyu tatudungan. O babainay iri, u tangasaantu ko sepet nika orip masakapah, sipakayni i sakakaay koyo pasebana' to kakawaw hananay a riked no heni. Anu itinitu i nobinawlan a kakawaw o demak aca, ruma to dademaken hananay sipakyni aca i sakakaay, o sakakaay hananay o satuasay kuyu tatengilen, kabanaan ko yaan a suwal no mama sakakaay paturtuy to saba', haenen ko nika dademak no heni to sapilimu'ut to dademaken. Sipakayni no Pangcah lalabu' no luma' hananayi, kumudkumud sananay a mapulung to dademaken ato iniyan satayal to niyan kakawawto noheni kakanglayay a demak, kumuden amin no heni. Ini lisin no lumaluma'an iri, maualah ko heni baluma' to icep, o apalu, uniyan kamaya, o kyabes, o makaen no lalabu no luma'. Irasisa iniyanhanto o caayay kalecad a kakawaw nina Pangcah hananay, o kakasapinangan ko nika caykalecad ato niyan kalaw tamtamdaw. Ona Pangcah hananay, maulah itini to caayay ka sumuwad no yaayaanay a kitakit. Ona Pancaah hananay, mingata midudu to yaan no caayhen kaw nisumuwadan, mingata to paoripay to heniyan a nisangaan, o sananaysisa maolah kuheni to mahiniyay caayay kawni sumuwadan, oyuho yaayaanay henay a kitakit. O mihecaan iri, adihay kiniyan nipisakakawaw no heni to lisin amibaung to paoripay, sikakawaw kuheni tuyu paluma', irakuyu miketep tonika adihay noheni nipaketepan, iniyan a miadup a mibuting numasakapahay a lisin talatuas sananay. O mamelamelawawy a nikadademak no heni a kakawawi, iniyan kyaru o hadihay ko niketpan, namiketep sananay a lisin, tangasa anini mamelaw no mitai, limuutun:henay no heni atangsa itini i wawa kusubana to matiniyay to mihemiehcaan mamelawto no mita kunika silisin noheni to mahiniyay o nipiketep hananay a niyaniyaro'. Yu makina misalisintu kuheni irir, tulutulu a rumiadi, tangatangsa i sakapitu a rumiad a maherek. Yu malingatu satuiri, tala lutuk ko ruma, tuwa tala liyal ko ruma a nika nanuwang no kapah no niyaro' a silisin,sikakawaw to tataa:kay a nika lecapo'. Ina Pangcah hananayi, yu malecapo'toway misatataak a mimelaw to matuasay atoyu kilemelay a misimsim, ato mabanaay a mikeru'. ira kya ta:ducusducus to iniyan o kero' hananay, kyanca o kalaw rimurimuratu nasaan kita a mimelaw tinademak iri, arawsaan itira ira kuyu tulun o subana' hananay i tini mahiniyay a makalecao' no heni, ira ko pasubana' adi:hay kiniyan o saka sidepoc sananay a nika lecapo' no heni. Irasisa to mihecaani, oyaankyaro o lalimo:ten no heni a lisin ko matiniyay. Misatatapangan nanay ko heni to niya no sakaorip no heni hananay, sakaitni nokakawasan a tenten hananay. O matiniyay satu no heni a kakawaw itini no Pangcah hananay, oyuno sakacaay karupisak kasumuwad ko cenfel no demak sananay. Mala Pangcah hanany a tamdawi manga:ay to labang, masakaola:han a cabayen, caypisa tatatata:ak ko inikaorip caytu pisaoyaoyaan, cayka sikakawaw toyo misasumusumuwad tuniya nika nanuwang ko Pangcah anu mamaan ko tiyad nisimsimman mahaaensa. Iniyan hananay iri, kabanaen ko nika awaay ko niumuwadan itiyaday ni heni a kakawaw, awaay ko nidumuwadan hanay mahaenay kyro o yaya:antu a caayay ka sumuwad caycaw ninananuwangan a kitakid. Anusuwalen kina kakawaw no Pangcah hananayi, mahana:min kawsa ko maoripay anini amisimsim tina Pangcah hananay saykasitatudung toyu nipakalas to demak, cakasitatudung tuyu misauyauyaan misumuwad to kakawaw, irasisa kakawlahan na:min no maoripay inyan a misimsim no heni, irasisa sakakapah nina tamdaw nusa kitai, sulinay ira kuyu sipakayni pakatatapangan no cudata kakawaw asaan iri, anu sipakayni no tamdawn anusaan iri, o mamela:wan kina kulit nina Pangcah hananay.
S.PHON: misiro~u~umo~u~ut sapinaŋ o~u so~u~uwaɾ no~u paŋʦaħ kina paŋʦaħ ħananaji, o~u najtinijaaj a tamɬ~ɮaw o~u tajwan,siwaʡ kina ŋaŋasawan no~u paŋʦaħ ħananaji, satataakaj a nika sanijaro~uʡ asa paŋʦaħ. o~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u ħəni iri, makasab~b~vaw to~u~u spat a əmaŋ,o~u aro~uʡ no~u ħəni iri, itinia:min i saamisan to~u~uwa taŋasa itini satimo~u~uɾan. inapanʦaħ ħananaji, piħaʦəŋ ko~u nika ɬ~ɮəb~b~vo~u~uŋan no~u napajraŋ a miso~u~umo~u~uwaɬ~ɮ ko~u nisimsim, maratar ko~u ħəni a mab~b~vanaʡ to~u nijan sapaanʡip ħananaj ato~u~u nijan sakamawmaħ a misato~u~uko~u~us ħananaj a ɬ~ɮəmak. ira ko~u~ujo~u~u nika taɾa ɾo~u~uto~u~uk no~u~uħənj a miaɬ~ɮo~u~up to~u aaɬ~ɮo~u~upən, jo~u~u taɾa ɾo~u~uto~u~uki,miɬ~ɮatəŋ, ano~u~u taɾa ɾijaɾ a mirəŋo~u~us ,itini aɾo~uʡ mib~b~vo~u~utiŋ, maħaən ko~u saka o~urip no~u ħəni. o~u~uno~u~u kakawawsan a ɬ~ɮəmak no~u ħəni i,to~u~usa kja miʦiɬ~ɮ:kaj a kakawaw, ʦaʦaj sato~u~ui, o~uno~u~u ina ko~u tato~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋan no~u ħəni iri, sipaŋaŋan ko~u ħəni iri, aɾaən ko~u taŋaɾ no~u ina amisaŋaʡ to~u ŋaŋan, mako~u~umo~u~uɬ~ɮ amin no~u inaan a ɾaɾab~b~vo~u~uʡ no~u ɾo~u~umaʡ a mao~urip. o~u kakawaw no~u ħəni to~u ɬ~ɮəmak ħananaj, o~uno~u ina ko~u ririɬ~ɮən no~u ħəni, ni ririɬ~ɮan no~u ina ko~u ħəni a mito~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ to~u saɬ~ɮəmakən to~u to~u~u:o~u~uɬ~ɮ, irasisa b~b~vab~b~vaħi ħananaj itini i ɾaɾab~b~vo~u~u no~u ɾo~u~umaʡ ħananaji, o~ujaan o~u maɾa tatapaŋan, nanaj o~u kakawaw nina ɾaɾab~b~vo~u~u no~u ɾo~u~umaʡ. skato~u~usa sato~u~u iri, ira ko~u~ujo~u~u miħəʦaan nika sarikəɬ~ɮ no~u ħəni to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakən sipakajni miħəʦaan ko~ujo~u~u tato~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋan. o~u b~b~vab~b~vainaj iri, o~u~u taŋasaanto~u~u ko~u səpət nika o~urip masakapaħ, sipakajni i sakakaaj ko~ujo~u pasəb~b~vanaʡ to~u kakawaw ħananaj a rikəɬ~ɮ no~u ħəni. ano~u~u itinito~u~u i no~ub~b~vinawɾan a kakawaw o~u ɬ~ɮəmak aʦa, ro~u~uma to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakən ħananaj sipakjni aʦa i sakakaaj, o~u sakakaaj ħananaj o~u sato~u~uasaj ko~u~ujo~u~u tatəŋiɾən, kab~b~vanaan ko~u jaan a so~u~uwaɾ no~u mama sakakaaj pato~u~urto~u~uj to~u sab~b~vaʡ, ħaənən ko~u nika ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak no~u ħəni to~u sapiɾimo~u~uʡo~u~ut to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakən. sipakajni no~u paŋʦaħ ɾaɾab~b~vo~u~uʡ no~u ɾo~u~umaʡ ħananaji, ko~u~umo~u~uɬ~ɮko~u~umo~u~uɬ~ɮ sananaj a mapo~u~uɾo~u~uŋ to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakən ato~u inijan satajaɾ to~u nijan kakawawto~u no~uħəni kakaŋɾajaj a ɬ~ɮəmak, ko~u~umo~u~uɬ~ɮən amin no~u ħəni. ini ɾisin no~u ɾo~u~umaɾo~u~umaʡan iri, mao~u~uaɾaħ ko~u ħəni b~b~vaɾo~u~umaʡ to~u iʦəp, o~u apaɾo~u~u, o~u~unijan kamaja, o~u kjab~b~vəs, o~u makaən no~u ɾaɾab~b~vo~u~u no~u ɾo~u~umaʡ. irasisa inijanħanto~u o~u ʦaajaj kaɾəʦaɬ~ɮ a kakawaw nina paŋʦaħ ħananaj, o~u kakasapinaŋan ko~u nika ʦajkaɾəʦaɬ~ɮ ato~u nijan kaɾaw tamtamɬ~ɮaw. o~una paŋʦaħ ħananaj, mao~u~uɾaħ itini to~u ʦaajaj ka so~u~umo~u~uwaɬ~ɮ no~u jaajaanaj a kitakit. o~una panʦaaħ ħananaj, miŋata miɬ~ɮo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~u to~u jaan no~u ʦaajħən kaw niso~u~umo~u~uwaɬ~ɮan, miŋata to~u pao~uripaj to~u ħənijan a nisaŋaan, o~u sananajsisa mao~uɾaħ ko~u~uħəni to~u maħinijaj ʦaajaj kawni so~u~umo~u~uwaɬ~ɮan, o~ujo~u~uħo~u jaajaanaj ħənaj a kitakit. o~u miħəʦaan iri, aɬ~ɮiħaj kinijan nipisakakawaw no~u ħəni to~u ɾisin amib~b~vao~u~uŋ to~u pao~uripaj, sikakawaw ko~u~uħəni to~u~ujo~u~u paɾo~u~umaʡ, irako~u~ujo~u~u mikətəp to~unika aɬ~ɮiħaj no~uħəni nipakətəpan, inijan a miaɬ~ɮo~u~up a mib~b~vo~u~utiŋ no~u~umasakapaħaj a ɾisin taɾato~u~uas sananaj. o~u maməɾaməɾawawj a nikaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak no~u ħəni a kakawawi, inijan kjaro~u~u o~u ħaɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u nikətpan, namikətəp sananaj a ɾisin, taŋasa anini maməɾaw no~u mitai, ɾimo~u~uo~u~uto~u~un:ħənaj no~u ħəni ataŋsa itini i wawa ko~u~uso~u~ub~b~vana to~u matinijaj to~u miħəmiəħʦaan maməɾawto~u no~u mita ko~u~unika siɾisin no~uħəni to~u maħinijaj o~u nipikətəp ħananaj a nijanijaro~uʡ. jo~u~u makina misaɾisinto~u~u ko~u~uħəni irir, to~u~uɾo~u~uto~u~uɾo~u~u a ro~u~umiaɬ~ɮi, taŋataŋsa i sakapito~u~u a ro~u~umiaɬ~ɮ a maħərək. jo~u~u maɾiŋato~u~u sato~u~uiri, taɾa ɾo~u~uto~u~uk ko~u ro~u~uma, to~u~uwa taɾa ɾijaɾ ko~u ro~u~uma a nika nano~u~uwaŋ no~u kapaħ no~u nijaro~uʡ a siɾisin,sikakawaw to~u tataa:kaj a nika ɾəʦapo~uʡ. ina paŋʦaħ ħananaji, jo~u~u maɾəʦapo~uʡto~uwaj misatataak a miməɾaw to~u mato~u~uasaj ato~ujo~u~u kiɾəməɾaj a misimsim, ato~u mab~b~vanaaj a mikəro~u~uʡ. ira kja ta:ɬ~ɮo~u~uʦo~u~usɬ~ɮo~u~uʦo~u~us to~u inijan o~u kəro~uʡ ħananaj, kjanʦa o~u kaɾaw rimo~u~urimo~u~urato~u~u nasaan kita a miməɾaw tinaɬ~ɮəmak iri, arawsaan itira ira ko~u~ujo~u~u to~u~uɾo~u~un o~u so~u~ub~b~vanaʡ ħananaj i tini maħinijaj a makaɾəʦao~uʡ no~u ħəni, ira ko~u paso~u~ub~b~vanaʡ aɬ~ɮi:ħaj kinijan o~u saka siɬ~ɮəpo~uʦ sananaj a nika ɾəʦapo~uʡ no~u ħəni. irasisa to~u miħəʦaani, o~ujaankjaro~u o~u ɾaɾimo~u:tən no~u ħəni a ɾisin ko~u matinijaj. misatatapaŋan nanaj ko~u ħəni to~u nija no~u sakao~urip no~u ħəni ħananaj, sakaitni no~ukakawasan a təntən ħananaj. o~u matinijaj sato~u~u no~u ħəni a kakawaw itini no~u paŋʦaħ ħananaj, o~ujo~u~uno~u sakaʦaaj karo~u~upisak kaso~u~umo~u~uwaɬ~ɮ ko~u ʦənfəɾ no~u ɬ~ɮəmak sananaj. maɾa paŋʦaħ ħananj a tamɬ~ɮawi maŋa:aj to~u ɾab~b~vaŋ, masakao~uɾa:ħan a ʦab~b~vajən, ʦajpisa tatatata:ak ko~u inikao~urip ʦajto~u~u pisao~ujao~ujaan, ʦajka sikakawaw to~ujo~u misaso~u~umo~u~uso~u~umo~u~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u~unija nika nano~u~uwaŋ ko~u paŋʦaħ ano~u~u mamaan ko~u tijaɬ~ɮ nisimsimman maħaaənsa. inijan ħananaj iri, kab~b~vanaən ko~u nika awaaj ko~u nio~u~umo~u~uwaɬ~ɮan itijaɬ~ɮaj ni ħəni a kakawaw, awaaj ko~u niɬ~ɮo~u~umo~u~uwaɬ~ɮan ħanaj maħaənaj kjro~u o~u jaja:anto~u~u a ʦaajaj ka so~u~umo~u~uwaɬ~ɮ ʦajʦaw ninanano~u~uwaŋan a kitakiɬ~ɮ. ano~u~uso~u~uwaɾən kina kakawaw no~u paŋʦaħ ħananaji, maħana:min kawsa ko~u mao~uripaj anini amisimsim tina paŋʦaħ ħananaj sajkasitato~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ to~ujo~u~u nipakaɾas to~u ɬ~ɮəmak, ʦakasitato~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ to~u~ujo~u~u misao~u~ujao~u~ujaan miso~u~umo~u~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u kakawaw, irasisa kakawɾaħan na:min no~u mao~uripaj injan a misimsim no~u ħəni, irasisa sakakapaħ nina tamɬ~ɮaw no~u~usa kitai, so~u~uɾinaj ira ko~u~ujo~u~u sipakajni pakatatapaŋan no~u ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮata kakawaw asaan iri, ano~u~u sipakajni no~u tamɬ~ɮawn ano~u~usaan iri, o~u maməɾa:wan kina ko~u~uɾit nina paŋʦaħ ħananaj.
